ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: pompoen 54%, wortel 18%, rode ui 13%, selderij 11%, bouillonpoeder 2,8% (zout, prei 16%, ui 15%, kruiden, specerijen, natuurlijke aroma's (selderij), tonaat 4,1%, knoflook 3,2%, gistextract, lavasbladextract, wortel 2,1%), koriander 0,6%
